message:
feat(web): use zero-copy sequence transfer in comparison overlay

ComparisonOverlay:
- Use SharedSequencePool.getOrCreateRef for both sequence A and B
- Pass sequenceARef and sequenceBRef to worker instead of raw strings
- Transfer buffers with postMessage(..., [...transferA, ...transferB])
  for efficient zero-copy or transfer-based communication
- Import ComparisonWorkerMessage type for proper typing of worker response
- Simplify diffMask handling (already Uint8Array from worker)
- Cast diffStats to DiffStatsType for type safety

This reduces memory usage and improves performance for large genome
comparisons by avoiding structured cloning of multi-megabyte strings.
When SharedArrayBuffer is available (with proper COOP/COEP headers),
both workers can read sequences directly from shared memory.

Refs: phage_explorer-8qk2
